quality_highlights: tools.md: well-structured with consistent code blocks per tool; clear cross-references to deeper docs; timeout configuration section is particularly well done
logs_command.go: excellent example coverage organized in labeled groups; handles many edge cases and date formats with clear inline comments
archie.md messages: clear status progression (started/success/failure) with appropriate emoji; failure message correctly links to run logs for diagnostics

single_file_improvements.issue: ValidateIncludedPermissions error message on line 293 prefixes 'ERROR: ' inside the error string, which is redundant. The function returns an error type already, and the caller at compiler_orchestrator_engine.go:202 wraps it again with 'permission validation failed: '. The final user-visible message becomes: error: permission validation failed: ERROR: Imported workflows... — the double-prefix looks unprofessional.

Line 174: the Custom MCP Servers 'Options' summary is a dense single sentence listing 6 configuration options (command+args, container, url+headers, registry, env, allowed) with type annotations. Enterprise users scanning for a specific option must parse the whole sentence. A bulleted list would match the format used throughout the rest of the file.
